General.Name: V2X Inc
General.Description: V2X, Inc. provides critical mission solutions and support services to defense customers internationally. It offers a suite of integrated solutions multi-domain impact readiness, integrated supply chain management, mission solutions, platform renewal and modernization, national security, defense, civilian, and international customers. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Reston, Virginia. V2X, Inc. is a subsidiary of Vertex Aerospace Holdco LLC.
General.Address: 2100 Reston Parkway, Reston, VA, United States, 20191
